Hardware Component File

RSAT4_ACU_eng_v15

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference RSAT4_ACU_eng_v15_20150511T131328.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 752
Receive ID 772
Functional Addr 2C
Functional Name Airbag-SRS
